steps.stdout: Server enters LISTEN. No connection exists until a client initiates one.
Client sends SYN(seq=1000). SYN consumes one sequence number, so the client will next use 1001.
Server receives SYN(seq=1000), calculates ACK=1001, and moves to SYN_RCVD.
Server sends SYN-ACK(seq=5000, ack=1001): it both acknowledges the client and announces its own sequence number.
Client receives SYN-ACK and verifies that ACK=1001 matches the number after its own SYN.
Client sends ACK(seq=1001, ack=5001) and may enter ESTABLISHED. The final ACK is proof that it received the server's reply.
Server receives the final ACK and validates that it acknowledges the server SYN (5000 + 1).
Server enters ESTABLISHED. Both endpoints agree on the next sequence numbers, so application data can flow reliably.
